top_signals.title: War in pieces: Air Force wants special ops plane that can be built on the fly
top_signals.summary: The Skyraider II, a militarized version of the AT-802 crop duster, is built to give isolated special ops teams eyes overhead and firepower on call.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: NATO Not Drawing Up Plans for Hormuz Mission
top_signals.summary: NATO is not drawing up any plans for a potential mission in the Strait of Hormuz and would need a political decision to do so, its top commander said on Tuesday, amid suggestions by some members that the alliance could play a role there.Any…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
